creator: george@m5p.com
text:
Thanks to email from Bertrand Petit, I now understand the idea that the font itself (okay, it's really fontconfig) is an active player in the game.  Trying Stephen Hurd's 15 December attachment has given me my desired result!

For me, at least, having fontconfig do what it does with ligatures is a flagrant POLA violation.  Not that anyone cares.
